preReview.title: San Jose Earthquakes contra New York Red Bulls: El impacto de Leroux es una 'sorpresa agradable', dice Arena
preReview.description: Esta semana, la MLS verá tanto a los San Jose Earthquakes como a los New York Red Bulls intentando fortalecer sus posiciones en los playoffs.

preReview.title: San Jose Earthquakes contro New York Red Bulls: l'impatto di Leroux una 'piacevole sorpresa', dice Arena
preReview.description: Questa settimana, l'MLS vede sia i San Jose Earthquakes che i New York Red Bulls cercare di rafforzare la loro posizione nei playoff.

preReview.title: San Jose Earthquakes x New York Red Bulls: Impacto de Leroux é uma 'agradável surpresa', diz Arena
preReview.description: Nesta semana, a MLS vê tanto o San Jose Earthquakes quanto o New York Red Bulls buscarem fortalecer suas posições nos playoffs.

preReview.title: San Jose Earthquakes v New York Red Bulls : L'impact de Leroux, une 'bonne surprise', dit Arena
preReview.description: Cette semaine, la MLS voit à la fois les San Jose Earthquakes et les New York Red Bulls chercher à renforcer leurs positions pour les séries éliminatoires.

preReview.title: San Jose Earthquakes v New York Red Bulls: Leroux impact a 'pleasant surprise', says Arena
preReview.description: This week, MLS sees both the San Jose Earthquakes and the New York Red Bulls look to strengthen their playoff positions.

preReview.description: Diese Woche wollen sowohl die San Jose Earthquakes als auch die New York Red Bulls ihre Playoff-Positionen in der MLS stärken.
